title: AI Trading Double Agent Achieves 78.26% Profitable Trades on NVDA/NVDS
author: tickeron_community
selftext: **NEW YORK** \- **May 13, 2025** \- [*PRLog*](https://www.prlog.org/) \-- Tickeron, a leader in AI-powered financial solutions, proudly announces that its [Double Agent AI Trading Bot](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/virtualagents/all/) has achieved a remarkable 78.26% profitable trade rate on NVIDIA Corporation ([NVDA](https://tickeron.com/ticker/NVDA/)) and its inverse ETF, [NVDS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/NVDS/). This advanced algorithm leverages Financial Learning Models (FLMs) to capitalize on market trends, offering traders a dynamic, dual-strategy approach to maximize profitability.
